seoTitle: Delan vs Depot Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Delan and Depot Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Delan vs Depot Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Delan and Depot Hill.
heading: Delan vs Depot Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Delan, Queensland and Depot Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Delan has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Depot Hill (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Delan or Depot Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Delan has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Depot Hill scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Delan scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Depot Hill scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Delan or Depot Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Delan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
